summary: PDC Auto-fill Feature Testing Complete - All features working correctly. Backend GET /api/ici-data/farmers/{farmer_id}/family-data returns PDC v2 data (genre, niveau_education, date_naissance, taille_menage, enfants) with proper source tracking. Frontend ICIProfileModal and SSRTEVisitModal correctly pre-fill forms from PDC data when no existing ICI profile exists.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend ici_data_collection.py lines 520-657: get_farmer_family_data endpoint correctly extracts PDC v2 data from step1.fiche1.membres_menage and producteur
Backend correctly prioritizes PDC data, then ICI, then SSRTE with proper source tracking (source='pdc', 'ici', 'ssrte', or combinations)
Frontend ICIProfileModal.jsx lines 89-127: fetchProfile correctly calls family-data endpoint and pre-fills form when no ICI profile exists
Frontend SSRTEVisitModal.jsx lines 86-114: loadFamilyData correctly pre-fills taille_menage, nombre_enfants, liste_enfants from family-data endpoint
Frontend SSRTEVisitModal.jsx line 274-278: prefilled-banner correctly displays when data.source is present
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDC auto-fill feature fully tested and working. Farmer Bamba Ibrahim (ID: 69d27f0c47797cbad7193b8c) has PDC with 6 members (3 enfants). Farmer Konan Yao Pierre (ID: 69d27ef947797cbad7193b8a) has ICI+SSRTE data. Both modals (ICIProfileModal, SSRTEVisitModal) correctly pre-fill from family-data endpoint.

backend_pdc_data_extraction.description: PDC v2 data correctly extracted from step1.fiche1.membres_menage and producteur

backend_source_priority.description: Family-data endpoint prioritizes PDC data, then ICI, then SSRTE

frontend_ici_modal_prefill.description: ICIProfileModal pre-fills genre, niveau_education, taille_menage, enfants from PDC

frontend_ssrte_modal_prefill.description: SSRTEVisitModal pre-fills taille_menage, nombre_enfants, liste_enfants from PDC
frontend_ssrte_modal_prefill.prefilled_banner: Informations familiales pre-remplies depuis les donnees existantes (PDC / ICI). Vous pouvez les modifier si necessaire.

frontend_ici_ssrte_fallback.description: When no PDC exists, ICI+SSRTE data is used for pre-fill

geographic_data_from_pdc.description: Geographic data (region, departement, sous_prefecture, village, campement) returned from PDC producteur

test_classes: TestFamilyDataEndpoint: 11 tests (endpoint exists, PDC source, genre, niveau_education, taille_menage, enfants, nombre_enfants, geographic data, ICI+SSRTE source, response structure, enfant structure)
